languages.text: "Пропал. Патент.... пропал". {n}Голос Себериана звучит безжизненно, он переводит взгляд с пустого постамента на вас, и вы видите, как вдруг натягивается лоскут его лица, тщетно силясь передать гнев, охвативший вашего предка.{/n} "Лишь одно отродье в Просторе Коронус способно на подобное святотатство, наследни{mf|к|ца}! Тразин".

"Gone. The Warrant is... gone." {n}Seberian's voice sounds lifeless as he looks back and forth between you and the empty pedestal, and you see the skin-scrap of your ancestor's face tighten in a futile bid to convey his anger.{/n} "My heir, of all the scum in the Koronus Expanse, only one is capable of such a sacrilege — Trazyn!"
languages.original_text: "Пропал. Патент.... пропал". {n}Голос Себериана звучит безжизненно, он переводит взгляд с пустого постамента на вас, и вы видите, как вдруг натягивается лоскут его лица, тщетно силясь передать гнев, охвативший вашего предка.{/n} "Лишь одно отродье в Просторе Коронус способно на подобное святотатство, наследни{mf|к|ца}! Тразин".

The Warrant is... gone." {n}Seberian's voice sounds lifeless as he looks back and forth at you and the empty pedestal, and you see the skin-scrap of his face tighten in a futile bid to convey your ancestor's anger.{/n} "My heir, of all the scum in the Koronus Expanse, only one is capable of such a sacrilege — Trazyn!"

The Warrant is... gone." {n}Seberian's voice sounds lifeless as he looks back and forth between you and the empty pedestal, and you see the skin-scrap of your ancestor's face tighten in a futile bid to convey his anger.{/n} "My heir, of all the scum in the Koronus Expanse, only one is capable of such a sacrilege — Trazyn!"

languages.text: "Weg. Der Handelsbrief ist ... weg." {n}Seberians Stimme klingt leblos, während sein Blick zwischen dir und dem leeren Podest hin- und herspringt, und du siehst, wie sich die Haut im Gesicht deines Ahnherren spannt, als dieser vergeblich versucht, seine Wut zu verbergen.{/n} "{mf|Mein Erbe|Meine Erbin}, von allen Schurken in der Koronus-Ausdehnung ist nur einer zu einem solchen Sakrileg fähig ... Trazyn!"
languages.original_text: "Gone. The Warrant is... gone." {n}Seberian's voice sounds lifeless as he looks back and forth between you and the empty pedestal, and you see the skin-scrap of your ancestor's face tighten in a futile bid to convey his anger.{/n} "My heir, of all the scum in the Koronus Expanse, only one is capable of such a sacrilege — Trazyn!"

traits.locale_text: "Weg. Der Handelsbrief ist ... weg." {n}Seberians Stimme klingt leblos, während sein Blick zwischen dir und dem leeren Podest hin- und herspringt, und du siehst, wie sich die Haut im Gesicht deines Ahnherren spannt, als dieser vergeblich versucht, seine Wut zu verbergen.{/n} "{mf|Mein Erbe|Meine Erbin}, von allen Schurken in der Koronus-Ausdehnung ist nur einer zu einem solchen Sakrileg fähig ... Trazyn!"

languages.text: « Envolée. La lettre de marque s'est... envolée. » {n}La voix de Seberian est presque sans vie, tandis qu'il regarde tour à tour le piédestal vide et vous-même ; la pellicule de peau recouvrant le visage de votre ancêtre tente en vain de se renfrogner, cherchant à laisser transparaître sa colère.{/n} « Mon {mf|héritier|héritière}, de toute la vermine grouillant dans les Étendues de Koronus, je n'en connais qu'une seule capable d'un tel sacrilège : Trazyn ! »
languages.original_text: "Gone. The Warrant is... gone." {n}Seberian's voice sounds lifeless as he looks back and forth between you and the empty pedestal, and you see the skin-scrap of your ancestor's face tighten in a futile bid to convey his anger.{/n} "My heir, of all the scum in the Koronus Expanse, only one is capable of such a sacrilege — Trazyn!"

traits.locale_text: « Envolée. La lettre de marque s'est... envolée. » {n}La voix de Seberian est presque sans vie, tandis qu'il regarde tour à tour le piédestal vide et vous-même ; la pellicule de peau recouvrant le visage de votre ancêtre tente en vain de se renfrogner, cherchant à laisser transparaître sa colère.{/n} « Mon {mf|héritier|héritière}, de toute la vermine grouillant dans les Étendues de Koronus, je n'en connais qu'une seule capable d'un tel sacrilège : Trazyn ! »

languages.text: «No está. La Patente... no está». {n}La voz de Seberian suena inerte. Pasa la mirada de ti al pedestal vacío, y ves que la piel artificial del rostro de tu ancestro se contrae en un intento vano de mostrar su furia.{/n} «Hereder{mf|o|a}, de toda la escoria de la Extensión de Koronus, solo una criatura es capaz de cometer tal sacrilegio: ¡Trazyn!».
languages.original_text: "Gone. The Warrant is... gone." {n}Seberian's voice sounds lifeless as he looks back and forth between you and the empty pedestal, and you see the skin-scrap of your ancestor's face tighten in a futile bid to convey his anger.{/n} "My heir, of all the scum in the Koronus Expanse, only one is capable of such a sacrilege — Trazyn!"

traits.locale_text: «No está. La Patente... no está». {n}La voz de Seberian suena inerte. Pasa la mirada de ti al pedestal vacío, y ves que la piel artificial del rostro de tu ancestro se contrae en un intento vano de mostrar su furia.{/n} «Hereder{mf|o|a}, de toda la escoria de la Extensión de Koronus, solo una criatura es capaz de cometer tal sacrilegio: ¡Trazyn!».

languages.text: "Gitmiş. Ruhsatname... Gitmiş." {n}Seberian'ın sesi, sen ve boş kaide arasında gözlerini gezdirirken cansız geliyor. Atanın yüzündeki deri parçasının öfkesini iletmek için nafile bir çabayla gerildiğini görüyorsun.{/n} "Vârisim, Koronus Enginliği'ndeki onca pislik arasında böyle bir saygısızlığı yapabilecek tek bir kişi var: Trazyn!"
languages.original_text: "Gone. The Warrant is... gone." {n}Seberian's voice sounds lifeless as he looks back and forth between you and the empty pedestal, and you see the skin-scrap of your ancestor's face tighten in a futile bid to convey his anger.{/n} "My heir, of all the scum in the Koronus Expanse, only one is capable of such a sacrilege — Trazyn!"

traits.locale_text: "Gitmiş. Ruhsatname... Gitmiş." {n}Seberian'ın sesi, sen ve boş kaide arasında gözlerini gezdirirken cansız geliyor. Atanın yüzündeki deri parçasının öfkesini iletmek için nafile bir çabayla gerildiğini görüyorsun.{/n} "Vârisim, Koronus Enginliği'ndeki onca pislik arasında böyle bir saygısızlığı yapabilecek tek bir kişi var: Trazyn!"

languages.text: “没了。贸易授状……没了。”{n}塞贝里安的声音毫无生气，视线在你和空荡荡的基座之间游移。你看到那位先祖脸上残存的皮肤微微绷紧，徒劳地想要传达他的愤怒。{/n}“我的继承人啊，科罗努斯扩区那群渣滓里，能干出这种亵渎之举的，只有一个人——特拉金！”
languages.original_text: "Gone. The Warrant is... gone." {n}Seberian's voice sounds lifeless as he looks back and forth between you and the empty pedestal, and you see the skin-scrap of your ancestor's face tighten in a futile bid to convey his anger.{/n} "My heir, of all the scum in the Koronus Expanse, only one is capable of such a sacrilege — Trazyn!"

traits.locale_text: “没了。贸易授状……没了。”{n}塞贝里安的声音毫无生气，视线在你和空荡荡的基座之间游移。你看到那位先祖脸上残存的皮肤微微绷紧，徒劳地想要传达他的愤怒。{/n}“我的继承人啊，科罗努斯扩区那群渣滓里，能干出这种亵渎之举的，只有一个人——特拉金！”

languages.text: 「消えた。証は…消えた。」{n}シベリアンの声は、あなたと空っぽの台座の間を交互に見ながら、生命力のないものだった。あなたの祖先の顔の皮は、怒りを伝えるための無駄な努力で引き締まっていた。{/n}「私の後継者よ、コロナス・エクスパンスのあらゆる汚い者の中で、この聖なる行為を犯せるのは一人だけだ。トラズン！」
languages.original_text: "Gone. The Warrant is... gone." {n}Seberian's voice sounds lifeless as he looks back and forth between you and the empty pedestal, and you see the skin-scrap of your ancestor's face tighten in a futile bid to convey his anger.{/n} "My heir, of all the scum in the Koronus Expanse, only one is capable of such a sacrilege — Trazyn!"
